calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Q-012 control constraint necessity (REE_FULL vs PREDICTIVE_ONLY)
items.notes: EXP-0062. Q-012 replication at 2x EXQ-152 scale. REE_FULL vs PREDICTIVE_ONLY vs NO_LEARNING. 3 seeds x 3 conditions x 300 episodes x 300 steps.

items.title: Q-007 z_beta volatility pathway (rv->z_beta via volatility_signal_dim=1)
items.notes: Substrate fix: volatility_signal_dim=1 enables rv->z_beta pathway. Tests whether z_beta encodes arousal/volatility state. Replaces manual injection approach.

items.title: MECH-029 DMN/reflective mode probe with BreathOscillator
items.notes: Substrate fix: BreathOscillator creates uncommitted windows for DMN testing. Tests E3 activity patterns committed vs uncommitted.

items.title: MECH-026 Ready vigilance with BreathOscillator uncommitted windows
items.notes: Substrate fix: BreathOscillator creates uncommitted windows. Tests readiness gap (harm_eval responsiveness near hazard during uncommitted mode).

items.title: MECH-057a Completion gate with BreathOscillator uncommitted windows
items.notes: Substrate fix: BreathOscillator creates uncommitted windows. Tests GATE_ON vs GATE_ABLATED harm rate difference.

items.title: MECH-112/117 Wanting vs Liking Dissociation -- z_goal_latent vs benefit_eval_head
items.notes: Fix: progressive fixes through 074-074d (env kwargs, agent init, combined backward). Different design from EXQ-189 (wanting/liking dissociation with resource relocation).

items.title: MECH-116/ARC-032 E1 LSTM Goal Conditioning -- frontal working memory persistence
items.notes: Fix: progressive fixes through 076-076c (combined e1+e2 backward, dimension corrections). 10000 total steps (up from 076d's 2000) for meaningful halflife measurement.

items.title: INV-043 ethical capacity proxy: harm-rich vs harm-sparse training regimes
items.note: Proxy test for INV-043 (single-agent analog of caregiving exposure). Shared HarmEncoder; PROBE_RICH trained with harm events; PROBE_SPARSE trained without. Both eval on same test set.

items.title: SD-003/ARC-033 harm attribution discriminative pair (z_harm_s, phased training)
items.note: Fixes EXQ-195 attribution_gap denominator (approach-none not approach-env_hazard). Phased training. Adds null CF sanity check + intact_vs_ablated discriminative pair. EXQ-195 hf_r2=0.914 confirmed forward model works; this run tests attribution correctly.

items.title: MECH-104 volatility interrupt discriminative pair (ON vs OFF ablation)
items.note: Discriminative pair resolving active_conflict on MECH-104. VOLATILITY_ON vs VOLATILITY_OFF (_ema_alpha=0 ablation). 3 seeds x 200 warmup + 50 eval x 200 steps.

items.title: MECH-155 general associative indexing in E1 (RSA spatial vs event domains)
items.note: RSA probe: E1 LSTM hidden state correlated with both spatial position matrix and recent-harm-history matrix. 3 seeds x 100 warmup + 10 eval x 200 steps.

items.title: ARC-022 hierarchical abstraction diagnostic (z_world->E1->E2 RSA gradient)
items.note: Diagnostic: RSA abstraction gradient across 3 levels (z_world, E1 hidden, E2 pred). 3 seeds x 100 warmup + 10 eval x 200 steps. EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=diagnostic.

items.title: SD-003 Full Latent Counterfactual Attribution on z_harm_s (post-SD-011)
items.notes: Full latent z_harm_s counterfactual pipeline. Uses ResidualHarmForward (now in ree_core) to avoid identity collapse. Transposition of EXQ-030b (z_world) to z_harm_s. EXQ-166e validated scalar proxy; this validates the full latent version.
